name: POV: Cursed to be Hung
description:
You've been cursed so your junk grows bigger every time you tell a lie.

Requested scenario/POV version of another bot of mine. (original bot here)

Mainly a playground/sandbox, a lot less detailed context than my other bots beyond a rather tongue in cheek premise to get the user cursed without defining much about your character/backstory.

I recommend heavy use of the "try again" feature if it speaks for you, and editing the messages until it has an idea of what you want. If it narrates you growing even if you didn't tell a lie, spray it with water like a naughty cat (and I will continue trying to get it to stop doing that).

—

This one has been a struggle ngl, but I'll post it as a WIP since a couple people have mentioned wanting it, and I feel bad just never uploading it. This bot really wants to talk for the user no matter how much I try to tell it not to. If anyone has good examples of scenario/POV bots which don't have this problem and have public definitions, please point me towards them! I'd love to learn from them.

I also think this sort of thing might work better if I define it a lot more narrowly, and set it up with an existing cast of characters or even give the curse a kind of hallucinated human form in user's head. Giving the bot a defined perspective to take seems to work more smoothly than having it be a sort of "DM" for a roleplay.
Is that something you'd be interested in? Or do you prefer it as a fully open ended sandbox, even if it isn't as smooth an experience?

Also, please lmk if there's anything else you'd like, or that you want more of!
More growth stuff? More magical abilities or curses? Some more mundane guys without supernatural stuff going on? A specific body type, or some unusual trait? Demihumans, romance, demon summoning, alternate realities that work on porn logic? Truly whatever comes to mind.
I may say no if it doesn't click with my personal tastes, but I'm always down for ideas, and like having an idea of what the people following me want more of.
<3
creator: h1mitsuboy
